summary: Completed comprehensive testing of mFirme Romanian company database platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate) with 1.2M+ companies data. Critical React Helmet error preventing frontend navigation discovered.

critical_bugs.issue: Helmet expects a string as a child of <title> - causing app crash on navigation
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents navigation to company pages and search pages - entire app unusable
critical_bugs.error_details: Invariant Violation: Helmet expects a string as a child of <title>. Did you forget to wrap your children in braces? ( <title>{''}</title> )
critical_bugs.root_cause: Template literals in Helmet title receiving undefined/null values instead of strings

ui_bugs.issue: Statistics cards (total companies, active companies, etc.) not visible on homepage
ui_bugs.impact: Statistics not displayed to users, though API returns correct data

passed_tests: Search autocomplete suggestions appear (5 suggestions for 'transport')
County navigation buttons visible and clickable

success_percentage.frontend: 30% (critical navigation failure due to React error)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix React Helmet error in CompanyPage.js and other pages. The error 'Helmet expects a string as a child of <title>' suggests template literals are receiving undefined values. Check all Helmet title implementations and add null checks. Example fix: <title>{company?.denumire || 'Loading...'} - CUI {company?.cui || ''} | mFirme</title>. Also investigate why statistics cards are not visible on homepage despite API returning correct data.
